title: Creamy Potatoes British Style
description: A comforting side dish inspired by traditional British cuisine, featuring creamy potatoes, a tangy twist, and a crispy topping.
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine sliced potatoes and enough cold water to cover. Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Add potatoes and cook for 5 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
In a separate saucepan, combine heavy cream, Dijon mustard, salt, and pepper. Bring to a simmer over medium heat.
Reduce heat to low and cook for 2-3 minutes, or until sauce has thickened slightly.
To assemble, arrange cooked potatoes in a baking dish. Pour cream sauce over potatoes and top with additional grated cheese if desired.
Transfer to preheated oven and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown and bubbly.
